summary: Racing game with track customization and time challenge mode. User reported the timer runs too fast, causing races to finish immediately.
known_issues: Timer runs too fast in time challenge mode — race finishes immediately after starting

existing_features.title: Fix the race countdown/race timer so it runs at the correct real-time rate (1 second per second). The timer must not count down faster than wall-clock time, and the race must not end prematurely immediately after starting.

projectName: Fix race timer running too fast
